Hero.name: Léo Deroin
Hero.subtitle: Fullstack Developer
Hero.intro: I jump aboard your web projects and ship interfaces people actually want to revisit. PHP, Symfony, React, Next, Vue — and a serious soft spot for what happens on screen.

About.title: Who runs the station?
About.bio1: Fullstack developer based in Lyon, hooked on interfaces that step outside the lines — the kind that make you stay on a page because something is actually happening.
About.bio2: I work mostly on the PHP/Symfony and JS/TS stacks (React, Next.js, Vue 3), from solid backends to polished frontend experiences. I like projects with a real reason to exist, not just a spec.
About.bio3: Apprentice at Confluent Digital in Lyon, building SaaS tools for SMBs and spending too much time animating shaders.

Skills.title: A star map of the stack
Skills.intro: Each star = a technology. Lines = how they fit together. Hover for details, filter to highlight a family.
Skills.yearsOfUse: {years, plural, one {# year of use} other {# years of use}}

confluent-digital.title: Fullstack Developer
confluent-digital.description: Fullstack apprenticeship at a digital agency: design and development of business web applications, project management, and teamwork on internal and client SaaS products.

esgi-master.title: Master's in Web Engineering
esgi-master.description: Master's degree on a work-study program, alongside the Confluent Digital apprenticeship. Specialized in modern web architectures.

elipce-apprenticeship.title: Fullstack Developer
elipce-apprenticeship.description: Built a multi-sport mobile app (React Native + Expo, PHP backend), maintained the internal Datanalyz platform, shipped corporate website modules (Python, JS, HTML/CSS), wrote technical and functional documentation, and joined the website redesign committees.

uga-but.title: BUT in Computer Science
uga-but.description: University Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science. First serious dive into the web stack and software development fundamentals.

elipce-internship.title: Fullstack Developer
elipce-internship.description: End-of-program internship: maintenance work on Datanalyz, the internal platform deployed at client sites.

la-poste.title: Customer Service Agent
la-poste.description: Part-time student job: customer welcome and advisory in a postal branch, direct communication with a wide range of clients.

lpo-monge.title: High School Diploma
lpo-monge.description: General baccalaureate with Mathematics and Engineering Sciences — scientific groundwork before pivoting to computer science.

Contact.title: Open a channel
Contact.intro: Project, freelance, collab, just saying hi. The terminal is listening.

Footer.tagline: I design and build web apps on the PHP / Symfony / Phalcon and JS / TS / Next / Vue stack. From rock-solid backends to polished frontend experiences.

Projects.metaDescription: Project gallery by Léo Deroin, fullstack developer in Lyon: web apps built with Next.js, React, Symfony, Phalcon, Vue.js. Personal, school and apprenticeship work at Confluent Digital.
Projects.title: Projects & missions
Projects.intro: Each card is a planet to explore — personal, school, work or freelance. Filter by category or stack to focus. A selection of web projects shipped in Lyon and elsewhere during my apprenticeship, studies and free time.
Projects.empty: No projects in DB. Run npm run db:seed to load the samples.

Blog.title: Articles

Uses.title: My setup and stack
Uses.intro: An honest list of everything I run daily on my machine — editors, hardware, browser, default stack. Updated when my setup actually shifts, not for show.
